validation.notes: Lean roadmap from architecture.md. 4 Python TDD steps + 1 markdown forge step. Sequential dependency chain.

phases.name: Search and Port Foundation
phases.description: Fix search query format and widen enrichment port

steps.name: Fix search query format and normalize new fields
criteria: Search requests use JSON searchParam format with size pagination
Status Open maps to topicReleaseStatus [592], Pre-Release to [591], no filter to [591, 592]
Normalized topics include cycle_name, release_number, published_qa_count
Topic IDs are hash format (contain underscore)
Existing pagination, retry, and rate-limiting behavior preserved
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Fix _build_search_params to construct searchParam JSON. Fix _normalize_topic to map cycleName->cycle_name, releaseNumber->release_number, noOfPublishedQuestions->published_qa_count, baaInstructions->baa_instructions. Use recorded fixture raw_api_search_correct_format.json for tests.

steps.name: Widen enrichment port signature and update integration points
criteria: Enrichment port accepts topic dicts with topic_id, cycle_name, release_number, component, published_qa_count
Completeness metrics track descriptions, qa, solicitation_instructions, component_instructions separately
Combined topics include all new enrichment fields
Completeness report messages include all 4 data types
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Per ADR-DSIP-01: change enrich(topic_ids: list[str]) to enrich(topics: list[dict]). Update FinderService to pass full candidate dicts. Update combine_topics_with_enrichment for new fields. Update completeness_report for 4 data types.

phases.name: Enrichment Data Sources
phases.description: API-first enrichment with details, Q&A, and instruction PDFs

steps.name: API-first enrichment (details + Q&A + instruction PDFs)
criteria: Details endpoint returns description, objective, keywords, technology_areas, focus_areas, itar, cmmc_level
Q&A entries parsed with double-JSON answer format; malformed answers fall back to raw string
Q&A skipped for topics with published_qa_count == 0
Instruction PDFs downloaded per cycle+component, text extracted via pypdf, cached within batch
Per-endpoint failure isolated: one failing data source does not block others
Enrichment status partial when any data source fails for a topic
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Replace PDF-only enrichment with 3 API calls: GET /topics/{hash}/details, GET /topics/{hash}/questions, GET /submissions/api/public/download/solicitationDocuments. Use recorded fixtures: raw_api_details_response.json, raw_api_qa_response.json, raw_component_instructions_army.pdf, raw_solicitation_instructions.pdf. Keep pypdf only for instruction PDF text extraction.

phases.name: CLI Integration
phases.description: Update CLI output and detail command

steps.name: CLI output and detail command update
criteria: Enriched topic JSON includes objective, keywords, technology_areas, focus_areas, itar, cmmc_level, qa_entries, solicitation_instructions, component_instructions, enrichment_status
Detail command works with hash ID format
Completeness metrics show all 4 data type counts
Existing fetch/enrich/score commands work with updated adapters
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: code/tdd. Update _build_filters to map status names to IDs. Update CLI output schema for new fields. Update detail command to accept hash IDs. Run CLI manually, record output, update fixtures.

phases.name: Skills and Agent Update
phases.description: Update markdown files for new data availability

steps.name: Update skills and agent for new data availability
criteria: dsip-cli-usage shows hash ID format in examples and documents all new output fields
dsip-enrichment describes API-first strategy with details/Q&A/instructions endpoints
Topic scout agent references Q&A, technology_areas, itar in recommendation logic
No stale references to numeric topic IDs or PDF-only enrichment
steps.implementation_notes: delivery: markdown/forge. Markdown edits only. <!-- DES-ENFORCEMENT : exempt -->
